calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-07-2008 Reset To Mar-18-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Petitioner: Juana Ramirez, was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Kayla Brianna Ramirez Lloyd & Jennifer Renteria Ramirez.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Good cause appearing, the Court determined that in each matter neither father was provided with proper notice of the proposed name changes, and the Court did not grant petitioner's request to change the minors' names without giving further notice to the other parent. Accordingly, the MATTER IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 18, 2008 @ 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minors' father of the new hearing date or Order dispensing with notice.

The Court directed petitioner to seek further assistance in this matter at the Access Center @ 575 Polk Street, San Francisco, CA.
